name: Phacoemulsification Cataract Surgery
description: Our expertise lies in rendering proficient and experienced surgeons for Phacoemulsification on Cataract.

name: Glaucoma
description: Glaucoma can result in partial or permanent loss of vision if left undiagnosed.

name: Lasik & Refractive Surgery
description: Popular surgical method to address vision issues that include elimination of dependency on spectacles.

name: Orbit and Oculoplastic Surgery
description: Our specialized branch in eye surgery to treat or reconstruct the areas surrounding the eyes.

name: Retina Evaluation
description: The retina resembles the film of a camera, a meager yet complex layer toward the rear of the eye that gets the engaged pictures from the focal points in front.

name: Paediatric Ophthalmology
description: Paediatric ophthalmology deals with the diagnosis and treatment of eye diseases in children.

name: Low Vision Aids
description: Low vision aids will help to deal with your vision loss. To find out more consult a doctor.

name: Ocula Prosthesis
description: An ocular prosthesis is an artificial eye made of medical grade plastic that replaces natural eye.
